title: Checklist - supplement 2024
description: Complete the supplementary checklist to make sure you have completed your supplementary tax return before lodgment.
keywords: Individual tax return instructions, supplement paper tax return checklist, supplement checklist, supplement 2024

content_blocks.text: Check that you have completed the following before you lodge your supplementary tax return:

items: your tax file number and name
written totals (if applicable) at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT INCOME OR LOSS TOTAL SUPPLEMENT DEDUCTIONS TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS
transferred the totals above, where instructed in your tax return
spouse details – married or de facto if you completed question T3

any letter code boxes at questions 13 Partnerships and trusts 17 Net farm management deposits or repayments 18 Capital gains 19 Foreign entities 20 Foreign source income and foreign assets or property 21 Rent Total supplement income or loss T9 Other refundable tax offsets
attached copies of all documents the supplementary tax return instructions tell you to attach
kept copies of your tax return, all attachments, and relevant papers for your own records.

content_text:
Check that you have completed the following before you lodge your supplementary tax return:
- your tax file number and name
- written totals (if applicable) at TOTAL SUPPLEMENT INCOME OR LOSS TOTAL SUPPLEMENT DEDUCTIONS TOTAL SUPPLEMENT TAX OFFSETS
- transferred the totals above, where instructed in your tax return
- question A5 , if required
- spouse details – married or de facto if you completed question T3
- any letter code boxes at questions 13 Partnerships and trusts 17 Net farm management deposits or repayments 18 Capital gains 19 Foreign entities 20 Foreign source income and foreign assets or property 21 Rent Total supplement income or loss T9 Other refundable tax offsets
- attached copies of all documents the supplementary tax return instructions tell you to attach
- kept copies of your tax return, all attachments, and relevant papers for your own records.
